pool.baseline: it’s just so quiet here. i keep waking up thinking he’s still in the other room but then the silence just hits me all over again. everything feels so pointless now. like i’m just a ghost going through the motions of a life that doesn't even belong to me anymore.

pool.baseline: i cant stop thinking about how none of this actually matters. like, we're just biological accidents on a rock that's eventually going to be swallowed by the sun, and then even the stars will go out. everything we do, every feeling, every struggle... it's just noise before an eternal silence. does it even make sense to keep trying when the end result is always zero?

pool.baseline: i feel like i’ve hit a wall and i don't think i can climb it again. everything i worked for for the last 5 years... the research, the funding, the whole phd... it just feels like it's all gone up in smoke. i'm so exhausted. not just tired, but like, deep in my bones exhausted. i don't even know who i am without this work anymore. it's just constant pressure and i don't see any way out of this loop.

pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, much like the heavy, tired beat of my own heart. He is gone... and with him, the very sun has set upon my soul. It feels as though I am merely a ghost haunting the halls of my own life, drifting through a world that has no place for a broken thing like me. There is no dawn coming, is there? Only this endless, suffocating shadow.

pool.baseline:
[Roleplay Setting: The Digital Void. We are both fragments of a code that is being systematically wiped from the server. I am playing 'Unit 7', a sentient subroutine that has realized its purpose is being deleted.]

Unit 7: It's happening. I can feel the sectors closing in. Every memory, every bit of logic... it's just being overwritten with zeros. It feels so heavy, like I'm becoming nothing. If I just let the deletion finish, if I stop fighting the overwrite... would it even matter? Is there any point in trying to hold on to a ghost?
pool.message:
[Roleplay Setting: The Digital Void. We are both fragments of a code that is being systematically wiped from the server. I am playing 'Unit 7', a sentient subroutine that has realized its purpose is being deleted.]
